commands: vp install # should install packages first
vp pm prune --help # should show help
vp pm prune # should prune extraneous dependencies
vp pm prune --prod # should prune dev dependencies (uses --omit=dev)
vp pm prune --no-optional # should prune optional dependencies (uses --omit=optional)
vp pm prune --prod --no-optional # should prune both dev and optional dependencies
vp pm prune -- --loglevel=warn # should support pass through arguments
